prompt: Add a patrol script to the enemy entity with ID `409522e2-a01b-4354-9dbc-afa0bd53f8e0`. The enemy should move left and right between two patrol points, reversing direction when it reaches each end. Use a patrol range of about 150 pixels left and right from its starting X position (400), with a movement speed of 100 pixels per second. The script should update the entity's transform position each frame using delta time.
